summary: Tested OrderBot troubleshooting feature - diagnose-order and fix-order endpoints. All 17 backend tests pass. Both endpoints work correctly: diagnose identifies issues (missing_sku, missing_firm, missing_customer_name) and fix-order successfully applies fixes.
critical_code_review_comments: Diagnose endpoint correctly identifies: missing_firm, missing_sku, missing_customer_name, missing_tracking, missing_invoice, duplicate_entry, not_in_dispatcher_queue
Fix endpoint supports: assign_firm, link_sku, link_sku_from_mapping, copy_customer_from_amazon, add_to_dispatcher_queue, cleanup_duplicate
Both endpoints properly require admin/accountant role authentication
Response structures are well-designed with order_summary, issues array with severity levels, and fixes_available
context_for_next_testing_agent: OrderBot troubleshooting feature verified. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_81_troubleshoot_orders.py covers: 1) Diagnose endpoint for orders with missing SKU, 2) Fix endpoint validation (missing params, invalid fix_type), 3) Authentication requirements, 4) Response structure validation. Orders tested: 171-3496729-7741914, 407-8638149-4710714, 402-9744612-5407541 - all had missing_sku issue detected. Fix endpoint successfully linked SKU to order 171-3496729-7741914.

features_verified.diagnose_order_not_found: PASS - Returns status 'not_found' for non-existent orders
features_verified.diagnose_response_structure: PASS - Returns order_id, issues, fixes_available, order_summary, available_firms
features_verified.fix_order_assign_firm_missing_firm_id: PASS - Returns 400 when firm_id not provided
features_verified.fix_order_link_sku_missing_sku_id: PASS - Returns 400 when master_sku_id not provided
features_verified.fix_order_link_sku_success: PASS - Successfully links SKU to order and updates database
